text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Crazy... I'm going to a movie with my friends,
right? But it has all this weird stuff—the seats
shake and move, and water sprays on you...

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
I've been to that theater once since coming to
Tokyo. I went out of my mind. I couldn't help
yelling out, like "Aaagh! Whoa-whoa-whoa!"

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
I mean, the seats move so much I almost flew off!
And who wouldn't scream if someone splashed
'em with water?!

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
But I guess I might've been annoying the people
around me... Hmmm... I'll just have to hold my
breath when I watch, huh?
